name: Arnold TradingView Overlay
description: Closed widget right-edge handle now slopes to exit_price (set via post-create setPoints, since createMultipointShape coerces both points to entry on widget creation). Restores the visual cue that distinguishes closed from active and lets TV's Closed P&L info-block read the actual exit price instead of bar-close at endEpoch. Earlier: trail line dropped from closed widgets; stripped stale FRVP override keys; visible-range filter for closed widgets; full info-block visibility; correct qty math; bare-minimum create payload.
